title: Everycash
description: A mod for make economy to your server in items. This mod will add in the complete version dollar bill, euro bill and yens bill and more.
body:
# Everycash
A mod to save your server items. This mod will add in the full version dollar, euro and yen banknotes and more...

#### You can currently craft dollars like this in the crafting table :
|❌|❌|❌|
| :---: | :---: | :---: |
|❌| Green dye |❌|
| Gold nugget | Paper | Gold nugget |

##### This will give you two $1 bills.
